title: lobelia × kauaensis
intro: Lobelia × kauaensis, also known as Kauai lobelia, is an ornamental plant species in the family Campanulaceae, native to Hawaii. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and expectorant effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of various ailments. Herbal preparations of Lobelia × kauaensis are often made into tinctures, teas, or salves, and are used to support the body's natural healing processes.
